text: I feel as though I am in transition, moving from a blank, static space to a charged environment alive with color, words, and potential. The white room is empty and slightly disorienting—almost anteroom to a more vibrant world. As I step into the R+D area, curiosity stirs. Surrounded by displays and thoughtful text, I am drawn to contemplate innovation and the intertwining of humanity with technology. I sense anticipation and wonder, tinged with a quiet resolve to understand my role within this evolving narrative.
